intents.name: track_order
intents.description: User wants to track the delivery status of an order

intents.name: cancel_order
intents.example: मैं अपना ऑर्डर रद्द करना चाहता हूँ
intents.description: User wants to cancel an existing order

intents.name: return_product
intents.description: User wants to return a delivered product

intents.name: refund_status
intents.description: User is inquiring about when their refund will be credited

intents.name: payment_issue
intents.example: पेमेंट हो गई पर ऑर्डर नहीं मिला
intents.description: Payment was deducted but order was not confirmed

intents.name: product_availability
intents.example: क्या यह साइज़ में मिलता है?
intents.description: User is checking if a product or variant is in stock

intents.name: shipping_cost
intents.description: User is asking about shipping or delivery fees

intents.name: delivery_time
intents.description: User is inquiring about the estimated delivery time

intents.name: change_address
intents.example: मैं डिलीवरी एड्रेस बदलना चाहता हूँ
intents.description: User wants to update the delivery address for an order

intents.name: exchange_product
intents.description: User wants to exchange a product for a different variant

intents.name: coupon_apply
intents.example: कूपन कोड काम नहीं कर रहा
intents.description: User is facing issues applying a discount coupon

intents.name: account_login
intents.example: मेरा अकाउंट लॉक हो गया है
intents.description: User is facing issues logging into their account

intents.name: order_modify
intents.example: मैं ऑर्डर में कुछ बदलना चाहता हूँ
intents.description: User wants to modify items in their current order

intents.name: store_hours
intents.description: User is asking about physical store operating hours

intents.name: complaint_register
intents.description: User wants to register a formal complaint

intents.name: product_review
intents.description: User wants to know how to leave a product review

intents.name: warranty_info
intents.description: User is asking about the warranty period or terms

intents.name: bulk_order
intents.description: User is inquiring about placing a bulk or B2B order

intents.name: gift_wrapping
intents.description: User is asking if gift wrapping services are available

intents.name: human_escalate
intents.example: मुझे किसी से बात करनी है
intents.description: User wants to talk to a human customer service agent
